ai_summary: Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC Ltd. has announced its 32nd Annual General Meeting for July 29, 2026, to be held virtually, and provided online access to its FY 2025-26 Annual Report, primarily informing shareholders without registered email IDs. A crucial material impact for investors is the mandatory submission of tax-related documents by July 24, 2026, to ensure appropriate Tax Deducted at Source (TDS) on FY 2025-26 dividends, with no red flags identified in this standard regulatory compliance.
